title: Terms and Conditions
intro: These Terms and Conditions of Use govern your access to flyair.lk and to the booking, support and information services we provide. By browsing the site, creating an account, or making a booking, you accept these terms in full.

sections.p:
Welcome to flyair.lk. This website is provided solely to assist customers in gathering travel information, making legitimate reservations and otherwise transacting business with travel suppliers, and for no other purposes. This site (the "Website") is maintained and published by Travellers Marketplace (Pvt) Ltd, a company incorporated and registered under the laws of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka under business registration number PV 00214561, operating the FlyAir consumer brand. If and when you access, browse or use this Website you accept, without limitation or qualification, the terms and conditions which appear below.

Travellers Marketplace (Pvt) Ltd will be referred to as ("FlyAir", "Website", "Travellers Marketplace", "Us", "We") and you may be referred to as ("Customer", "Client", "User") throughout this document and the website.

Cancellation fees vary from airline to airline. For details about a specific airline's cancellation fee, please contact our customer support team at 0788 788 788 or email info@flyair.lk.

The following Terms and Conditions of Use, together with any extra terms posted on this website (for example fare rules at checkout and the Privacy Policy), constitute the entire agreement between FlyAir and you with respect to your use of this Website.

While you may make limited copies of your travel itinerary (and related documents) for travel or services booked through this Website, you agree not to otherwise modify, copy, distribute, transmit, display, perform, reproduce, publish, license, create derivative works from, transfer, or sell or re-sell any information, software, products or services obtained from or through this Website.

If you comply with these terms and conditions of use, FlyAir grants you a non-exclusive, non-transferable, limited right to enter, view and use this website. You agree not to interrupt or attempt to interrupt the operation of this website in any way.

Any waiver of cancellation charges shall be at the sole discretion of the supplier (the airline or other provider).

If a customer is unable to avail any services due to any cancellation of services by any supplier, the customer must immediately cancel any connected bookings to claim a part refund, if eligible as per the applicable cancellation policy.

If for any reason the full booking amount is not charged at the time of booking, FlyAir will seek the balance amount from the customer or cancel the booking with the appropriate cancellation charges and will only refund the balance amount to the customer.

All materials on this Website, including but not limited to audio, images, software, text, icons and the like ("the content"), are protected by copyright under international conventions and the copyright laws of Sri Lanka.

All proprietary logos, service marks and trademarks found on this website are owned by Travellers Marketplace (Pvt) Ltd. By displaying them on this website, FlyAir is not granting you any licence to use those proprietary logos, service marks or trademarks. Any unauthorised use of the content may violate copyright laws, the laws of privacy and publicity, and other applicable laws.

If this Website contains chat rooms, access to mailing lists or other forms of communication facility, you agree to use the same only to send and receive messages and material that are proper. You agree that when using the Website or any facility available here, you shall not do any of the following:

1. Defame, abuse, harass, stalk, threaten or otherwise violate the legal rights of others.
2. Publish, post, distribute or disseminate any defamatory, infringing, obscene, indecent or unlawful material or information.
3. Upload or attach files that contain software or other material protected by intellectual-property laws (or by rights of privacy and publicity) unless you own or control the rights or have received all consent required by law.
4. Upload or attach files that contain viruses, corrupted files or any other similar software or programs that may damage the operation of another person's computer.
5. Delete any author attributions, legal notices or proprietary designations or labels in any file that is uploaded.
6. Falsify the origin or source of software or other material contained in a file that is uploaded.
7. Advertise or offer to sell any goods or services, conduct or forward surveys, contests or chain letters, or download any file posted by another user of a forum that you know, or reasonably should know, cannot be legally distributed in such manner.

The Website may contain services such as email, chat, bulletin-board services, information related to tourist destinations, news groups, forums, communities, personal web pages, calendars and/or other messaging (collectively, the "Communication Services"). The User agrees and undertakes to use the Communication Services only to post, send and receive messages and material that are proper and related to the particular Communication Service. By way of example, and not as a limitation, the User agrees and undertakes that when using a Communication Service, the User will not:

1. Defame, abuse, harass, stalk, threaten or otherwise violate the legal rights of others.
2. Publish, post, upload, distribute or disseminate any inappropriate, profane, defamatory, infringing, obscene, indecent or unlawful topic, name, material or information.
3. Upload files that contain software or other material protected by intellectual-property laws unless the User owns or controls the rights or has received all necessary consents.
4. Upload or distribute files that contain viruses, corrupted files or any other similar software or programs that may damage the operation of the Website or another person's computer.
5. Upload or distribute files that contain viruses, corrupted files or any other similar software or programs that may damage the operation of the Website or another person's computer.
6. Advertise or offer to sell or buy any goods or services for any business purpose, unless the Communication Service specifically allows such messages.
7. Conduct or forward surveys, contests, pyramid schemes or chain letters.
8. Download any file posted by another user of a Communication Service that the User knows, or reasonably should know, cannot be legally distributed in such manner.
9. Falsify or delete any author attributions, legal or other proper notices or proprietary designations or labels of the origin or source of software or other material contained in a file that is uploaded.
10. Violate any code of conduct or other guidelines that may be applicable for or to any particular Communication Service.
11. Violate any of the terms and conditions of this Agreement or any other terms and conditions for the use of the Website contained elsewhere herein. You shall be solely liable for any damages resulting from any violation of the foregoing restrictions, or any other harm resulting from your posting of content to this Website. You acknowledge that Travellers Marketplace (Pvt) Ltd may exercise its rights (for example use, publish, delete) to any content you submit without notice to you. If you submit more than one review for the same hotel or supplier, only your most recent submission is eligible for use.

You are fully responsible for the content of your submissions (specifically including, but not limited to, reviews posted to this Website). You are prohibited from posting on or transmitting to or from this Website:

1. Any unlawful, threatening, libellous, defamatory, obscene, pornographic or other material or content that would violate rights of publicity and/or privacy or that would violate any law.
2. Any commercial material or content (including, but not limited to, solicitation of funds, advertising or marketing of any good or services).
3. Any material or content that infringes, misappropriates or violates any copyright, trademark, patent right or other proprietary right of any third party. You shall be solely liable for any damages resulting from any violation of the foregoing restrictions, or any other harm resulting from your posting of content to this Website.

1. There can be exceptional circumstances in which FlyAir and/or the service providers may be unable to honour confirmed bookings due to events such as an act of God, labour unrest, insolvency, a pandemic, an epidemic, business exigencies, government decisions, terrorist activity, operational or technical issues, route or flight cancellations, or any other reason beyond the control of FlyAir.

2. If FlyAir has advance knowledge of any such situation where dishonour of bookings may occur, it will make its best efforts to provide a similar alternative to the User or to refund the booking amount after deducting applicable service charges, if supported and refunded by the respective service provider. The User agrees that FlyAir, being merely a facilitator of the services and products booked, cannot be held responsible for any such force-majeure circumstance. The User must contact the service provider directly for any further resolution or refund.

3. The User agrees that in the event of non-confirmation of a booking due to technical reasons (such as network downtime, disconnection with third-party platforms like payment gateways or banks) or any other similar failure, FlyAir's obligation shall be limited to refunding the booking amount, if any, received from the customer. Such refund shall completely discharge FlyAir from all liabilities with respect to that transaction. Additional liabilities, if any, shall be borne by the User.

4. In no event shall FlyAir be liable for any direct, indirect, punitive, incidental, special or consequential damages, and any other damages such as damages for loss of use, data or profits, arising out of or in any way connected with the use or performance of the Website.

Internet transmissions are never completely private or secure. You understand that any message or information you send to this Site may be read or intercepted by others, unless there is a special notice that a particular message (for example credit-card information) is encrypted (sent in code). Sending a message to FlyAir does not create any special responsibility on FlyAir's part toward you.

The copyright in the contents of this website belongs to Travellers Marketplace (Pvt) Ltd. Accordingly, FlyAir reserves all rights. Copying part or all of the contents of this website without the permission of FlyAir is prohibited, except to the extent that such copying or printing is necessary for the purposes of using the paid services provided.

This Site may contain contests that require you to send in material or information about yourself, or that offer prizes. Each contest has its own rules, which you must read and agree to before you participate.

The material in this Site could include technical inaccuracies or typographical errors. FlyAir may make changes or improvements at any time.

The materials on this site are provided on an "As Is" basis, without warranties of any kind either expressed or implied. The information, software, products and services contained on this website, and the inclusion or offering of any products or services on this website, do not constitute any endorsement or recommendation of such products or services by FlyAir, its affiliates and their respective suppliers. To the fullest extent permissible under applicable law, FlyAir disclaims all warranties of merchantability relating to the information and description of the hotel, air or any other travel products displayed on this website (including, without limitation, the pricing, photographs, list of hotel amenities, general product descriptions and similar information), much of which information is provided by the respective suppliers. Hotel or any other ratings displayed on this website are intended only as general guidelines, and FlyAir, its affiliates and their respective suppliers do not guarantee the accuracy of the ratings. FlyAir, its affiliates and their respective suppliers make no guarantees about the availability of specific products and services. FlyAir may make improvements and/or changes on this website at any time.

FlyAir has endeavoured to ensure that all the information it provides is correct, but FlyAir neither warrants nor makes any representations regarding the quality, accuracy or completeness of any data or information. FlyAir makes no warranty, express or implied, concerning the website and/or its contents, and disclaims all warranties of fitness for a particular purpose and warranties of merchantability in respect of services, including any liability, responsibility or any other claim whatsoever, in respect of any loss, whether direct or consequential, to any user or any other person, arising out of or from the use of any such information.

You also acknowledge that through this Site, FlyAir merely provides intermediary services in order to facilitate high-quality services to you. FlyAir is not the last-mile service provider to you and therefore FlyAir shall not be, or be deemed to be, responsible for any lack or deficiency of services provided by any person (airline, travel/tour operator, hotel, facility or similar agency) you engage, hire or appoint pursuant to or resulting from the material available on this Site. FlyAir, its affiliates and their respective suppliers hereby disclaim all warranties and conditions with regard to this information, software, products and services, including all implied warranties and conditions of merchantability, satisfactory quality, fitness for a particular purpose, title and non-infringement.

In no event shall FlyAir be liable for any direct, indirect, punitive, incidental, special, consequential damages or any other damages resulting from: (a) the use or the inability to use the services; (b) the cost of procurement of substitute goods and services or resulting from any goods, information or services purchased or obtained or messages received or transactions entered into through the services; (c) unauthorised access to or alteration of the user's transmissions or data; (d) any other matter relating to the services; including, without limitation, damages for loss of use, data or profits, arising out of or in any way connected with availing services from FlyAir.

Further, FlyAir shall not be responsible for the delay or inability to use the website or services, the provision of or failure to provide services, or for any information, software, products, services and related graphics obtained from FlyAir, whether based on contract, tort, negligence, strict liability or otherwise. FlyAir shall not be held responsible for non-availability of the website during periodic maintenance operations or any unplanned suspension of access to the services that may occur due to technical reasons or for any reason beyond FlyAir's control. The user understands and agrees that any material and/or data downloaded or otherwise obtained from FlyAir is done entirely at their own discretion and risk, and they will be solely responsible for any damage to their computer systems or any other loss that results from such material and/or data.

These limitations, disclaimers of warranties and exclusions apply without regard to whether the damages arise from (a) breach of contract, (b) breach of warranty, (c) negligence, or (d) any other cause of action, to the extent such exclusion and limitations are not prohibited by applicable law.

The products and services displayed on the Site may not be available for purchase in your particular country or locality. The reference to such products and services on the Site does not imply or warrant that these products or services will be available at any time in your particular geographical location. You should check with our call-centre agents on 0788 788 788 or at info@flyair.lk.

FlyAir may add to, change or remove any part of these Terms and Conditions of Use at any time, without notice. Any changes to these Terms and Conditions of Use or any terms posted on this Site apply as soon as they are posted. By continuing to use this Site after any changes are posted, you indicate your acceptance of those changes.

FlyAir may add, change, discontinue, remove or suspend any other content posted on this Site, including features and specifications of products described or depicted on the Site, temporarily or permanently, at any time, without notice and without liability.

FlyAir reserves the right to undertake all necessary steps to ensure that the security, safety and integrity of FlyAir's systems, as well as its clients' interests, are and remain well protected.

Towards this end, FlyAir may take various steps to verify and confirm the authenticity, enforceability and validity of bookings placed by you.

If FlyAir, in its sole and exclusive discretion, concludes that any booking is not, or does not reasonably appear to be, authentic, enforceable or valid, then FlyAir may cancel that booking at any time up to 5 hours before the scheduled time of departure of the relevant flight, or 5 hours before the expected date of visit to any property booked through FlyAir.

Be sure to return to this page periodically to review the most current version of this agreement. We reserve the right at any time, in our sole discretion, to change or otherwise modify the agreement without prior notice, and your continued access or use of this Website signifies your acceptance of the updated or modified agreement.

You may travel to certain destinations that involve greater risks than others, entirely at your own risk as to cost and consequences.

FlyAir requests you to consult your local authorities and to evaluate travel prohibitions, warnings, announcements and advisories issued by them before booking travel to certain international destinations.

By offering for sale travel to particular international destinations, FlyAir does not represent or warrant that travel to such point is advisable or without risk. FlyAir does not accept liability for damages, losses or delays that may result from improper documents for entry, exit, length of stay, or from travel to such destinations.

You agree to abide by the terms and conditions of purchase imposed by any supplier with whom you elect to deal, including, but not limited to, payment of all amounts when due and compliance with the supplier's rules and restrictions regarding availability and use of fares, products or services. Some hotel suppliers may require you to present a credit card or cash deposit upon check-in to cover additional expenses incurred during your stay. Such deposit is unrelated to any payment received by FlyAir for your hotel booking. You acknowledge that some third-party providers offering certain services and/or activities may require you to sign their liability waiver prior to participating in the service and/or activity they offer. You understand that any violation of any such supplier's rules and restrictions may result in cancellation of your reservation(s), in your being denied access to the applicable travel product or services, in your forfeiting any monies paid for such reservation(s), and/or in our debiting your account for any costs we incur as a result of such violation.

No waiver by FlyAir of any provision of these Terms and Conditions shall be binding except as set forth in writing and signed by its duly authorised representative.

If any dispute arises between you and FlyAir during your use of the Site or thereafter, in connection with and arising from your use or attempt to use this Site, the dispute shall be referred to arbitration.

These terms and conditions are governed by and shall be construed in accordance with the laws of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, and any dispute shall be subject exclusively to the jurisdiction of the appropriate courts situated at Colombo, Sri Lanka.

sections.h: Security, Credit Cards and Account Related Information
sections.p:
1. While registering on the Website, the User will have to choose a password to access that User's account, and the User shall be solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of both the password and the account, as well as for all activities on the account. It is the duty of the User to notify FlyAir immediately in writing of any unauthorised use of their password or account, or any other breach of security.

2. FlyAir will not be liable for any loss that may be incurred by the User as a result of unauthorised use of the password or account, either with or without the User's knowledge. The User shall not use anyone else's account at any time.

3. The User understands that any information that is provided to this Website may be read or intercepted by others due to any breach of security at the User's end.

4. For cases of fraud detection, offering bookings on credit (finance) and similar purposes, FlyAir may at times verify certain information of its Users, as and when required.

5. Additionally, FlyAir may share your personal information in an anonymised and/or aggregated form with a third party that FlyAir may engage to perform certain tasks on its behalf, including but not limited to payment processing, data hosting, data processing and assessing credit-worthiness for offering bookings on credit.

6. FlyAir cannot guarantee that there will never be any security breach of its systems, which may have an impact on the User's information.

7. The data of the User as available with FlyAir may be shared with concerned law-enforcement agencies for any lawful or investigation purpose without the consent of the User.

flyair.lk uses HTTPS with TLS 1.2 or higher and a regulated payment gateway with 3-D Secure (OTP) verification to keep your personal information safe and confidential as it travels from your computer to our servers and from our servers to our payment partner. SSL/TLS is an encryption technology that scrambles a message so that only the intended recipient can read the data. All of the ordering information you provide is encrypted by your TLS-enabled browser BEFORE it gets sent.

All payment-related information such as credit-card details is collected and kept by the relevant banks and our payment partner; the rest of the information such as Name, Email and Phone number that is collected here is for FlyAir's use only.

FlyAir is committed to providing a simple, seamless and efficient refund process. All refund applications must be applied through the online refund-request form provided in the customer-support section. All refunds are subject to final approval by the specific supplier related to airlines, hotels, lodging, travel insurance and other service providers. The value to be determined for refund will also be subject to the approved refund value by the specific suppliers. The refund procedure for different payment methods is set out below.

COVID-19 — Refund Policy

Please note that all refunds requested for travel affected due to the COVID-19 pandemic, or any similar large-scale public-health event, are subject to approval by the respective airline/supplier. This means the usual refund policy and the lead time in processing the refunds back to the customer may be affected due to the unprecedented demand in requests received.

We shall notify you on the progress of your refund on a regular basis through calls or emails to the respective contact information provided by you at the time of booking.

Refund Payments

A) Credit/Debit Card Payments

• Refunds are processed to the credit/debit card account where a payment has been made by the card.
• A transaction processed through Sampath EMI, Commercial EMI or EDC machine cannot be refunded back to the card; the refund will be processed in the form of a cheque as mentioned in clause B), after deducting the convenience fee.

B) Other forms of payment

• FlyAir will refund only to the person named on the ticket.
• Refund payments will be processed through an account-payee cheque drawn in favour of each ticket holder and will be deposited to the respective bank accounts.
• A passenger needs to submit a copy of their NIC when requesting a refund.
• Refunds for infants and children, where the ticket holder does not have an NIC, will be refunded back to either one of the parents. The birth certificate of the infant or child should be submitted for verification purposes.

1. Fares may change unless ticketed.
2. Special fares are subject to penalties / non-refundable.
3. All fares and taxes are subject to change as per market conditions and currency fluctuations.
4. Unutilised or partially utilised tickets are subject to an airline refund/cancellation fee.
5. If passengers do not travel on booked dates, AIRLINE NO-SHOW charges apply.
6. Date-change charges apply as per each airline.
7. Per cardholder can purchase a maximum of 4 tickets.
8. Ticket may be subject to a difference in fare during date changes.
9. Payment by credit card is subject to a convenience fee.
10. Instalment schemes are available with credit cards and may be subject to a handling fee.
11. Not liable for non-travel due to lack of destination/transit visa or other mandatory travel/visa document(s).
12. Not liable for non-travel due to mismatches/mistakes in passenger names.
13. Some tickets require verifications and passport details before issuing.
14. TTL is indicative, not entirely to rely upon since subject to change by the airline at any time. Always complete payment as soon as possible to secure the fare.
15. Payments must be realised and ticket issued before Ticket Time Limit (TTL).
16. For offline payments such as cheque and bank transfers, payment needs to reach us within at least one working day, otherwise the transaction will be cancelled.
17. No sale is confirmed until the E-TICKET is issued to customers.
18. flyair.lk is a facilitation platform providing easy and convenient access to reservations. Due to the volatile nature of the aviation industry, airlines delay and default in refund of tickets. We shall be in a position to process customer refunds against flight tickets only if the same have been refunded by the respective airline. In the event an airline discontinues its operations, we will not be accountable for any customer refunds where the same have not been refunded by the airline.

Rescheduling/Cancellation Charges

Airlines stop accepting cancellation/rescheduling requests 24 to 72 hours before departure of the flight, depending on the airline.

Rescheduling Charges = Rescheduling/Change Penalty + Fare Difference (if applicable).

All rescheduling and cancellation will be subject to a FlyAir handling fee of LKR 1,500 per passenger.

Disclaimer: The airline penalty is indicative based on an automated interpretation of airline fare rules; as such, FlyAir does not guarantee the accuracy of this information. For confirming cancellation/change fee, please call our customer care on 0788 788 788.

Payment Convenience Fee

Depending on payment method there may be an additional convenience fee: LKR 0 for cash deposit/bank transfer (online and offline); credit/debit cards (2% for Visa/Mastercard and 2.6% for American Express cards).

FlyAir reserves the right to charge listing fees for certain listings, as well as transaction fees based on certain completed transactions using the services. FlyAir further reserves the right to alter any and all fees from time to time, without notice.

The User shall be completely responsible for all charges, fees, duties, taxes and assessments arising out of the use of the services.

In case there is a short charging by FlyAir for listing, services or transaction fee, or any other fee or service because of any technical or other reason, it reserves the right to deduct/charge/claim the balance subsequent to the transaction at its own discretion.

In the rare event of a reservation not being confirmed for any reason whatsoever, we will process the refund and intimate you of the same. FlyAir is not under any obligation to make another booking in lieu of or to compensate or replace the unconfirmed one. All subsequent further bookings will be treated as new transactions with no reference to the earlier unconfirmed reservation.

The User shall request FlyAir for any refunds against the unutilised or 'no show' air or hotel booking for any reasons within 90 days from the date of departure for the air ticket and/or the date of check-in for the hotel booking. Any applicable refunds will accordingly be processed as per the defined policies of airlines, hotels and FlyAir, as the case may be. No refund will be payable for any requests made after the expiry of 90 days as above, and all unclaimed amounts for such unutilised or 'no show' air or hotel booking shall be deemed to have been forfeited.

Gift-card redemptions are non-refundable.

1. All bookings made through FlyAir are subject to the requirements of visa, including but not limited to transit visa and OK TO BOARD, which are to be obtained by the User as per the requirement of their travel bookings and the requirements of the countries the User intends to visit or transit through.

2. FlyAir is not responsible for any issues, including inability to travel, arising out of such visa requirements, and is also not liable to refund any amount to the User for being unable to utilise the booking due to absence or denial of visa, irrespective of whether or not the User has availed the services of FlyAir (or our sister brand travellers.lk) for the visa process too. Refund, if any, will be as per the applicable terms of booking and cancellation policy.

sections.h: Usage Of The Mobile Number, Communication Details Of The User By FlyAir
sections.p:
1. FlyAir will send booking confirmation, itinerary information, cancellation, payment confirmation, refund status, schedule change or any such other information relevant for the transaction or booking made by the User, via SMS, internet-based messaging applications like WhatsApp, voice call, email or any other alternate communication detail provided by the User at the time of booking.

2. FlyAir may also contact the User through the modes mentioned above for any pending or failed bookings, to know the preference of the User for concluding the booking and also to help the User for the same.

3. The User hereby unconditionally consents that such communications via SMS, internet-based messaging applications like WhatsApp, voice call, email or any other mode by FlyAir are:

• upon the request and authorisation of the User;
• 'transactional' and not an 'unsolicited commercial communication' as per the guidelines of the Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (TRCSL); and
• in compliance with the relevant guidelines of TRCSL or such other authority in Sri Lanka and abroad.

4. The User will indemnify FlyAir against all types of losses and damages incurred by FlyAir due to any action taken by TRCSL, service providers (as per TRCSL regulations) or any other authority due to any erroneous complaint raised by the User on FlyAir with respect to the communications mentioned above, or due to a wrong number or email id being provided by the User for any reason whatsoever.

Right To Refusal By FlyAir

1. FlyAir at its sole discretion reserves the right to not accept any booking without assigning any reason thereof.

2. We will not provide any service or share e-Ticket/confirmed booking details until such time the complete consideration is received from the customer.

3. In addition to other remedies and recourse available to us under these Terms and Conditions or under applicable law, we may limit the User's activity, warn other users of the User's actions, immediately suspend or terminate the User's registration, or refuse to provide the User with access to the Website.

4. Once a User has been suspended or terminated, such User shall not register or attempt to register with us with different credentials, or use the Website in any manner whatsoever until such User is reinstated by us. We may at any time in our sole discretion reinstate suspended users.

5. If a User breaches these Terms and Conditions, we reserve the right to recover any amounts due to be paid by the User to us, and to take appropriate legal action as we deem necessary.

6. The User shall not write or send any content to us which is, or communicate with us using language or content which is, abusive, threatening, offensive, defamatory, coercive, obscene, belligerent, glorifying violence, vulgar, sexually explicit, pornographic, illicit or otherwise objectionable.

7. If the User violates any of the aforesaid terms, we shall be at liberty to take appropriate legal action against the User.

Right To Refusal By End Service Provider/Airline

8. Customer agrees that the end service provider may refuse to provide the service(s) agreed to be provided to the Customer for any booking made through us, with or without assigning any reasons or owing to reasons including but not limited to behavioural issues, public safety, health hazards, infectious diseases, government orders/notification, etc. In such scenarios of refusal, the liability that may ensue shall solely vest with the end service provider as it is outside the purview of us, and the User agrees that any claim, refund or damages against such refusal shall lie solely against the end service provider and not FlyAir.

Right To Cancel By FlyAir

1. The User expressly undertakes to provide us with correct and valid information while making use of the Website under these Terms and Conditions, and not to make any misrepresentation of facts. Any default on the part of the User would disentitle the User from availing the services from us.

2. In case we discover or have reason to believe at any time during or after receiving a request for services from the User that the request for services is either unauthorised or the information provided by the User or any of the travellers is not correct, or that any fact has been misrepresented by that User, we shall be entitled to appropriate legal remedies against the User, including cancellation of the bookings, without any prior intimation to the User. In such an event, we shall not be responsible or liable for any loss or damage that may be caused to the User or any other person in the booking, as a consequence of such cancellation of booking or services.

3. If any judicial, quasi-judicial, investigation agency, or government authority approaches us to cancel any booking, we will cancel the same without approaching the concerned User whose booking has been cancelled.

4. The User shall not hold FlyAir responsible for any loss or damage arising out of measures taken by us for safeguarding our own interest and that of our genuine customers. This would also include us denying or cancelling any bookings on account of suspected fraud transactions.

1. Users are advised to check the description of the services and products carefully before making a booking. User(s) agree to be bound by all the conditions as contained in the booking confirmation or as laid out in the confirmed e-Ticket/booking voucher. These conditions are also to be read in consonance with these Terms and Conditions.

2. If a User intends to make a booking on behalf of another person, it shall be the responsibility of the User to inform such person about the terms of this Agreement, including all rules and restrictions applicable thereto.

3. The User undertakes to abide by all procedures and guidelines, as modified from time to time, in connection with the use of the services available through FlyAir. The User further undertakes to comply with all applicable laws, regulations, orders, directions etc. issued by either the Government, the Central Bank of Sri Lanka, the Civil Aviation Authority of Sri Lanka or any other statutory body empowered to do so with reference to use of services or for each transaction.

4. The services are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. FlyAir may change the features or functionality of the services being provided at any time, in its sole discretion, without any prior notice. We expressly disclaim all warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including but not limited to the implied warranties of merchantability, reasonably fit for all purposes. No advice or information, whether oral or written, which the User obtains from FlyAir or through the services opted shall create any warranty not expressly made herein or in the terms and conditions of the services.

5. User also authorises FlyAir's representatives to contact such user over phone, message and email at any time.

1. Except with the prior registration with FlyAir as B2B sub-agents, corporate agents or a franchisee, and explicit permission of FlyAir to use the Website, all travel agents, tour operators, consolidators or aggregators ("Travel Agents") are barred from using this Website for any commercial or resale purpose.

2. If any such bookings are detected, FlyAir reserves the right, including without limitation, to cancel all such bookings immediately without any notice to such travel agents and also to withhold payments or any refunds thereto. FlyAir shall not be held liable for any incidental loss or damage that may arise from the bookings made by any person through such Travel Agents. The liability in case of such cancellations shall be solely borne by such Travel Agents.

3. All discounts and offers mentioned on the Website are applicable only to the User(s) of FlyAir for legitimate bookings.
